Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Agony Path
Waystone (Tier 14)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +39% (augmented)
Pack Size: +15% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +85% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 80
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Venomous" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 31(27-33)% chance to Poison on Hit
{ Prefix Modifier "Frostbitten" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 19(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Cold
{ Prefix Modifier "Puncturing" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 17(15-20)% chance to inflict Bleeding on Hit
{ Suffix Modifier "of Slowing" (Tier: 1) }
Players are periodically Cursed with Temporal Chains — Unscalable Value
{ Suffix Modifier "of Hexwarding" (Tier: 1) }
50(50-40)% less effect of Curses on Monsters
{ Suffix Modifier "of Smothering" (Tier: 1) }
Players have 38(40-36)% less Recovery Rate of Life and Energy Shield
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
